headline: Stephens & Co. Reinstates Equal-Weight on Regions Financial, Announces $31 Price Target
summary: Stephens & Co.  analyst Matt Olney   reinstates Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) with a Equal-Weight and announces $31 price target.
